static.description: A minimal Flask REST API that provides a greeting endpoint, a health check endpoint, and a personalised greeting endpoint.
domain_concepts: Greeting: The configurable salutation word (default 'Hello') used in all API responses.
Health Check: A lightweight endpoint (/health) that returns service availability status.

dynamic.architecture_summary: A minimal single-file Flask REST API exposing three HTTP endpoints: a root endpoint, a health-check endpoint, and a parameterized greeting endpoint. The application follows a simple flat structure with a pytest test suite for verification.

key_components.name: Copilot Instructions
key_components.responsibility: GitHub Copilot configuration instructions for the project

agent_safe_operations: Adding or modifying pytest test cases
agent_forbidden_operations: Removing existing API endpoints without explicit instruction
Changing the Flask application entry point structure
potential_pitfalls: The actual application source files (e.g., app.py, requirements.txt, tests/) are not visible in the provided file tree — the repository as shown contains only generated AgentReady scaffolding and documentation, not the original Flask application code
